# flush

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Flush sidebar framing — the default, pixel-identical to the original app shell.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SidebarFraming.Variant` "Flush" → `FlushFraming`
  - Uses: `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Sidebar`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.SidebarHeader`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.SidebarInset`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.SidebarProvider`, `ui/sidebar-framing.SidebarFraming`
